text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Hey, did you hear? You know, about the scrimmage this weekend.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Right, the one Narita Taishin's going to race in. "Another chance to
see what she's really made of," was it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone at the academy knows about the scrimmage thanks to
Winning Ticket and her days-long spree of shouting all around
campus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But the reactions to the big news are mixed.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is precise, and Winning Ticket runs like a rocket. And
it isn't just them... The other racers have been training just as hard.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
There's no way Taishin's winning this. I just hope she doesn't overdo it
and get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I try approaching the glum-looking racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's close with Biwa Hayahide and Winning Ticket, so she probably
knows more about their much-talked-about abilities than most.
choice_data_list: You must be feeling the pressure.
You must be feeling the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Who asked you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks grim, but I still remember that video—her fiery sprint down
the homestretch.
choice_data_list:
You don't need to get caught up in the fight for
position.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? Who do you think you're talking to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You mean I'm already a disgrace? So I should just lose without making
a damn fuss?!
choice_data_list: Wait! I mean, if you don't fight, you can win!
Wait! I mean, if you don't fight, you can win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Take it slow in the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's insane... If I let the big runners like Hayahide get ahead, I'll
never catch up!
choice_data_list:
With your breakaway speed, you can overtake
anyone!

With your breakaway speed, you can overtake
anyone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't get it... What are you getting all bothered for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure if she really got my advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But it's too late now—the gates are opening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clank!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Biwa Hayahide's off in excellent form. She's got a nice
position in the front.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket too. Must be in a good mood 'cause she knows so
many of the racers! I can't wait to see her in the last stretch!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Narita Taishin's way in back... I wonder if she tripped up her
start.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Crap, I can't take this. The front's getting blocked off... It's like a
wall.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You don't need to get caught up in the fight for position."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Take it slow in the beginning."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Wait! I mean, if you don't fight, you can win!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Wait! I mean, if you don't fight, you can win!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "With your breakaway speed, you can overtake anyone!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "With your breakaway speed, you can overtake anyone!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Here it is, the last corner! Ah, Winning Ticket's coming up fast!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAGH! FULL SPEED AHEEEAD!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh, as I predicted, Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
It's Biwa Hayahide and Winning Ticket! Will it come down to a fight
between those two powerhouses?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Wait! From the outside!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haaaaargh!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin?! Look at that burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(This is it—don't lose focus! Keep your eyes on me! Watch me do
this!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I'm Narita Taishin, a trueborn racer!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's even more focused than in the video... Like a blade forged from
all her willpower and perseverance, she cuts straight to the front.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone holds their breath as it ends, and Narita Taishin wins a close
finish. Following her are Biwa Hayahide and Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's more than enough to make her full potential known—a truly
stunning race.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Well, looks like I still have some studying to do. How could I misjudge
a racer like her?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! I looost!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Knock it off. I can't deal with your painful whining so soon after a
race.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But, but, but! I went all out! I really thought I was gonna be all like,
"Yay, I won," like always!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But... I just couldn't keep up with you! I'm still burning with
excitement!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's why! We should definitely, no, ABSOLUTELY race again with everything we've got!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haha. No thanks, I can't take anymore of your screaming, dummy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I believe we've communicated our reasons for wanting to help well
enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
None of us can afford to lose our most powerful rivals here. We're in
this together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Enough with the touchy-feely talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The commotion dies down, and Narita Taishin hesitantly walks over to
me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um... Hey.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So, Ticket put words in your mouth the other day, but uh... If you really, um, y'know... You can say it now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: NO, you idiot! I'll kick your ass! I mean, whether you want to...
choice_data_list: Yes! I want to scout you!
Yes! I want to scout you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Sure.
